features.name: DataFrame and Column API
features.description: Core API for creating, accessing, and comparing DataFrames and Columns, including typed accessors, demo-table helpers, and assertion utilities used across the test suite.
features.evidence_summary: All members deal with DataFrame/Column creation, access, and equality assertion, sharing the Table/Column/Cell/expect naming root.

features.name: Function Output Annotations
features.description: Tests for the output-annotation system that controls how function results join or replace existing DataFrame, Column, or ColumnList outputs.
features.evidence_summary: Seven functions share the testOutputAnnotation/testOutput naming root and systematically cover join-vs-replace semantics across Df/Col/ColList output types.

features.name: Vector Functions
features.description: Tests for the JS API's vectorized column-computation mechanism, covering both fully vectorizable and partially non-vectorizable parameter configurations.
features.evidence_summary: Exact vectorFunc/vectorScript name-root match and the symmetric NonVectorizableParam pair confirm these four members test the same vector-function API surface.

features.name: Package Function Infrastructure
features.description: Baseline dummy functions, scripts, and a query that verify fundamental package-level registration, async invocation, and default-value handling in the JS API.
features.evidence_summary: Shared 'dummy'/'Package' name root across function, script, and query signals deliberate baseline stubs for package-API smoke-testing.

features.name: Semantic Type Detection
features.description: Tests the registration and invocation of custom semantic-type detectors that classify column content at runtime.
features.evidence_summary: The only function with role='semTypeDetector' in meta, confirming it is the semantic type detector registration test fixture.

features.name: Script Engine and Property Parsing
features.description: Tests for the script execution engine, covering property annotation parsing, formula evaluation, NaN output handling, and package-level property defaults.
features.evidence_summary: FormulaScript, propertyParsing, and Test NaN output each probe distinct aspects of script-engine behavior (formula eval, property annotation, edge-case output); the setOptions changelog entry belongs to the same engine-configuration surface.

features.name: UI Input Forms and Dialogs
features.description: Tests for the Datagrok dialog and input-form system, including custom input renderers, multi-field forms, and dialog lifecycle validation.
features.evidence_summary: CustomStringInput, InputFormTest*, and the two dialog doc pages all exercise the same dialog/input-form surface of the JS API.

features.name: File and Connector API
features.description: Tests for the dapi.files API and connector framework, covering local file functions, file-connector queries, and web connector integration.
features.evidence_summary: FileFuncTest, file-connector doc, web-connector doc, and the changelog entry for dapi.files.list tests all belong to the file and connector access surface.

features.name: Data Query API
features.description: Tests for building and running database queries via the JS API, including join-based table queries and Elasticsearch integration.
features.evidence_summary: build-query-test and elastic-search-test docs share the query-execution theme and are the primary API surface covered by this feature.

features.name: Data Transformation and Table Operations
features.description: Tests for data normalization, sorting, color coding, and the transformation editor — the core non-scripted table manipulation surface.
features.evidence_summary: All four test pages exercise table-level data manipulation (transform, normalize, sort, color code) that form a coherent data-wrangling cluster.

features.name: Data Export
features.description: Tests for exporting tables and views to various file formats through the JS API.
features.evidence_summary: Single dedicated export-test doc covers the export surface; isolated but distinct enough from transformation to merit its own feature.

features.name: Projects and Collaboration
features.description: Tests for the project browser, sharing, user registration, and inviting collaborators — the multi-user collaboration surface of Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: projects-browser, project-gallery, recently-open, inviting-a-friend, and registration docs collectively cover the collaboration lifecycle (create, share, invite, register).

features.name: UI Navigation and Metadata
features.description: Tests for platform-level UI navigation including the help system, menu visibility controls, entity tags, favorites, and entity collections.
features.evidence_summary: Help, menu visibility, tags/favorites, and collections are all platform navigation and metadata management features grouped under the UI shell surface.

features.name: Substructure Filter
features.description: Integration test for the chemical substructure filter, verifying that structure-based column filtering works end-to-end in the platform.
features.evidence_summary: Single test doc for substructure filter, a chem-domain feature isolated from all other API surface areas in this package.
